/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/lib CMakeFiles/mus2mid.dir/mus2mid.c.o CMakeFiles/mus2mid.dir/memio.c.o CMakeFiles/mus2mid.dir/z_native.c.o CMakeFiles/mus2mid.dir/i_system.c.o CMakeFiles/mus2mid.dir/m_argv.c.o CMakeFiles/mus2mid.dir/m_misc.c.o CMakeFiles/mus2mid.dir/d_iwad.c.o CMakeFiles/mus2mid.dir/deh_str.c.o CMakeFiles/mus2mid.dir/m_config.c.o -o mus2mid  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL2-2.0.0.dylib
